programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When a man (Christopher Lloyd) claiming to be Fester, the missing brother of Gomez Addams (Raul Julia), arrives at the Addams' home, the family is thrilled. However, Morticia (Anjelica Huston) begins to suspect the man is a fraud, since he cannot recall details of Fester's life. With the help of lawyer Tully Alford (Dan Hedaya), Fester manages to get the Addams clan evicted from their home. Gomez

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Topik ini menerangkan tentang pengertian jahiliah. Diperincikan hal kejahilan dalam bidang akidah dan akhlak serta pelbagai pegangan akidah yang dianuti oleh masyarakat jahiliyah. Kejahilan masyarakat Arab ini masih wujud dan ada di antaranya masih diamalkan sehingga sekarang. Murid murid dikehendaki meninggalkan akhlak buruk yang terdapat dalam masyarakat sekarang yang mirip kejahilan masyarakat

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: David Attenborough A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-func

programme.title: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah's Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paper

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and translocate lions across Africa to replenish a once-extinct population.

programme.title: Showdown of the Unbeatables
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features Brooklyn Bedding memory foam versus the Dynapac CC722 roller; a peanut detecting dog versus the Vortexx Pressure Washer; and Blendtec blenders versus the indestructible Bash sledgehammer.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: On a wild and dangerous adventure to Mexico, BMX bikers Rooftop and Catfish test how gutsy they really are. The pair go from racing bikes to racing donkeys, flame throwing and tricking in pointy shoes on the streets, to loosing their breakfast trying to eat eyeball tacos for lunch. But the duo's bravery (or stupidity) doesn't end there. They compete in a rodeo, milk a snake for its venom, spin ups

programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 449
programme.desc: couple of lovers who are prevented from being together by their parents' approval. They are Dipta (Megantara) and Nuna (Ochi Rosdiana), and they must maintain their love in secret. Due to Nuna's mother's blockade, their love tale must overcome numerous challenges.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 73
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. Bella takes Ayuna to a workshop to give her a surprise: Ayuna's sports car has been upgraded as a gift, since Bella is getting married before her older sister. Bella then asks Ayuna to have one last race on a deserted road as her farewell to the racing world, a request that Ayuna agrees to with a hea

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 47
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. programme.desc: Delivers timely and in-depth coverage of key global events, focusing on international politics, economics, and societal changes, with a spotlight on the latest developments impacting the world today.

programme.title: Echoes From the North Ep02
programme.desc: Explores the dance traditions of the Bisaya, Kenyah, and Lun Bawang groups in north Sarawak, highlighting the culture, resilience, and spirit of indigenous peoples through captivating stories and visuals.
